---
description: Verify implementation matches change artifacts before archiving
---

## Alias of **`/skillgrid-review`** (section A — on-disk verify)

Open and follow **`skillgrid-review.md`**. The **`openspec status`** / **`openspec instructions apply`**-driven verification and report file steps are defined there (alongside Engram and general code review).

## Completion report (required)

Use the **Completion report** at the end of **`/skillgrid-review`**: what you did, token usage if the product shows it (else **`Token usage: not shown in this environment`**), and suggested next (**typically `/skillgrid-security`** or **`/skillgrid-validate`**).
